_README: Shared cadence + compliance metadata for the per-sector campaigns (P2-5). Sending is OFF (SEND_ENABLED master gate). Founder-blocked values are template variables filled at send time.

cadence._note: Touch 0 immediate; +3, +7, +12, +19 days. Full 7-touch plan in the draft is 0/3/7/12/19/28/40; this cadence ships the first 5 (0/1/2 + 2 nudges) per the P2-5 scope. Saturday is skipped by the scheduler (send-pacing.sendingPausedToday).

credential_line: LLM in International Business Law, King's College London

merge_fields.{{finding}}: ONE real detection from website-intel.js on the prospect's own site
merge_fields.{{clause}}: the regulator clause the finding is measured against

founder_blocked_vars.{{company_number}}: ⛔ UK Companies House number (filled at send)
founder_blocked_vars.{{ico_number}}: ⛔ ICO data-controller registration number (filled at send)
founder_blocked_vars.{{reg_address}}: ⛔ Tamazia Ltd registered postal address, England & Wales (filled at send)

footer_vars.{{unsubscribe_url}}: signed one-click unsubscribe link (visible body link + List-Unsubscribe header)
footer_vars.{{eu_rep_line}}: EU Article 27 representative line (EU recipients only; empty for UK/UAE)

provenance_line: How we found you: public registers, your website and business directories. Details: {{privacy_notice_url}}.

headers.List-Unsubscribe: set by relay-router.js (mailto + RFC-8058 one-click when UNSUB_ENDPOINT live)

compliance_rails: No fake scarcity / countdowns / invented deadlines (UK DMCCA 2024).
The audit is genuinely free to the cold recipient (value, not bait).
No client names; anonymised sector descriptors only.
No invented metrics; only published regulator statistics, else omit.
Every shipped finding must be a real detection on the prospect's own site.
Two asks per touch (soft + 1:1 meeting). Meeting is with the founder, never 'the team'.
Right-person ask in every touch. Credential line in every signature.
Sends only from warmed Mystrika inboxes, never tamazia.co.uk. SEND_ENABLED OFF until the founder flips it.
